name: Test-First Change Guardrail
shortDescription: Forces failing-test-first delivery for reliable code changes.
longDescription: Encodes a deterministic red-green workflow for behavior-changing code updates and requires regression evidence before merge.
author: ARS Labs

inputs.name: change_request
inputs.description: Bug report or feature acceptance criteria.

outputs.name: failing_test_patch
outputs.description: Test updates that fail before implementation.

outputs.name: verification_log
outputs.description: Execution evidence that updated and regression tests pass.

includedAssets.name: references/checklist.md
includedAssets.description: Compact execution checklist for test-first delivery.

includedAssets.name: references/test-design-patterns.md
includedAssets.description: Deterministic test design patterns for reproducible behavior checks.

includedAssets.name: references/flaky-test-triage.md
includedAssets.description: Playbook for identifying and remediating flaky tests.

failureModes: Tests created after implementation hide root cause.
Plans skip explicit baseline behavior capture.

examples.title: Tax rounding bug fix
examples.summary: Captures off-by-one cent failure before changing calculator logic.
examples.outputPreview: Passing focused tests + full regression log

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic test-first workflows.
